reviews.review_description: Even though I'm an adult,  I seek out & try educational apps if they pique my interest.  This app contains 360º videos that explain a variety of 4 separate tunneling techniques.  Each of the 4 sections vary in length and contain a number of different scenes/locations.  This is a passive experience; after selecting a tunneling method, there is no further interactivity whilst you watch the video.  You might nitpick the resolution of the video, but for a free app, this is just great.  It's not so technical that you require an engineering background; it seems tailored for the general public and is presented almost like a tour of the various operations.  I think kids will enjoy it, and teens & adults will learn a decent bit about a fascinating topic.  Highly recommended!

I learned a lot about the hard condition from several of your app but this is the best one of all of them. It is well presented and I want to thank you for making this free. Just missing a quit button, and a navigation map.

Stay safe and best of luck.
